code:
import io
import string

let line = io.read_line()
mut n = 0
match line
when Some(s)
  match string.parse_int(string.trim(s))
  when Some(v)
    n = v
  when None
    n = 0
  end
when None
  n = 0
end

mut i = 1
while i <= n
  let m3 = i % 3
  let m5 = i % 5
  if m3 == 0 and m5 == 0
    println("FizzBuzz")
  else if m3 == 0
    println("Fizz")
  else if m5 == 0
    println("Buzz")
  else
    println("#{i}")
  end
  i = i + 1
end
